programs.title: Modern Family
programs.desc: Cameron is putting on the school production of Phantom of the Opera, but when their star falls ill, Manny pulls out all the stops to land the lead.

programs.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programs.desc: The couples have met their alternate matches. But now it's time for the real carnage: getting them to watch videos of how their spouses behaved.

programs.title: First Dates
programs.desc: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. And will single mum Rachel be happy to roll with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Marge agrees to pretend to be Apu's wife when his mother visits to set up his arranged marriage, and Homer moves into the Retirement Castle.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: During a school archaeological dig, Lisa finds the skeleton of an angel on the site where a new shopping mall is to be built.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Grampa's old friend Gus wants his help at the helm of his fast-food empire, leading to a Succession-style plot of corporate espionage. With John Lithgow.
